info.title: IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDose ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDoseVS.title: IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDose ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDoseVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 9 years-40
Client is not due for HPV vaccination-48
No HPV primary series doses were administered-112
Client's age is between 9 and 20 years-51
Client is due for HPV vaccination-44
Client's age is more than 20 years-41
Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note.-66
One HPV primary series dose was administered-112

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDoseVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTHPVSingleDoseVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
